repos.project_scope: AI-powered simulated market research pipeline for CPP AI Hackathon 2026. Uses Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind, Supabase, Recharts. 6-stage pipeline: Client Discovery, Consumer Interviews, Survey Design, Survey Responses, Data Analysis, Validation Report. Key concerns: bias mitigation, 3-model triangulation (STAMP methodology), product-agnostic prompting.
